2026-02-11T11:08:34.884139+00:00Z.question: how many accounts ordered our product in LTD, YTD, MTD and QTD

query_decomposition.intent_summary: Return the number of distinct parent accounts that ordered the product for Life-To-Date (LTD), Year-To-Date (YTD), Quarter-To-Date (QTD), and Month-To-Date (MTD), each bounded by the dataset's most recent week_end_date and aligned to the month_year and quarter_year labels.

subqueries.name: max_week_cte
subqueries.purpose: Anchor all 'to-date' periods to the most recent date in the data.
subqueries.logic: Compute MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_date from drug_sales.

subqueries.name: min_week_cte
subqueries.purpose: Define the starting boundary for LTD.
subqueries.logic: Compute MIN(week_end_date) AS min_week_date from drug_sales.

subqueries.name: current_labels_cte
subqueries.purpose: Derive current month and quarter labels and the 2-digit year aligned to the most recent week.
subqueries.logic: Using max_week_cte.max_week_date, select DISTINCT month_year AS current_month_year and quarter_year AS current_quarter_year from drug_sales where week_end_date = max_week_cte.max_week_date. Derive current_year_yy as the 2-digit year component from current_month_year (substring before the hyphen, e.g., '25' from '25-Jan').

subqueries.name: ltd_accounts_cte
subqueries.purpose: Compute the total distinct parent accounts that ordered in LTD.
subqueries.logic: Select COUNT(DISTINCT parent_eid) AS ltd_accounts from drug_sales where qty_sold_pu > 0 and week_end_date between min_week_cte.min_week_date and max_week_cte.max_week_date.

subqueries.name: ytd_accounts_cte
subqueries.purpose: Compute the total distinct parent accounts that ordered in the current YTD.
subqueries.logic: Select COUNT(DISTINCT parent_eid) AS ytd_accounts from drug_sales join current_labels_cte on 1=1 where qty_sold_pu > 0 and week_end_date <= max_week_cte.max_week_date and the 2-digit year part of month_year (characters before the hyphen) equals current_labels_cte.current_year_yy.

subqueries.name: qtd_accounts_cte
subqueries.purpose: Compute the total distinct parent accounts that ordered in the current QTD.
subqueries.logic: Select COUNT(DISTINCT parent_eid) AS qtd_accounts from drug_sales join current_labels_cte on 1=1 where qty_sold_pu > 0 and week_end_date <= max_week_cte.max_week_date and quarter_year = current_labels_cte.current_quarter_year.

subqueries.name: mtd_accounts_cte
subqueries.purpose: Compute the total distinct parent accounts that ordered in the current MTD.
subqueries.logic: Select COUNT(DISTINCT parent_eid) AS mtd_accounts from drug_sales join current_labels_cte on 1=1 where qty_sold_pu > 0 and week_end_date <= max_week_cte.max_week_date and month_year = current_labels_cte.current_month_year.

subqueries.name: final_metrics_cte
subqueries.purpose: Assemble the four scalar results into a single output row and default missing values to 0.
subqueries.logic: Select COALESCE(ltd_accounts_cte.ltd_accounts, 0) AS ltd_accounts, COALESCE(ytd_accounts_cte.ytd_accounts, 0) AS ytd_accounts, COALESCE(qtd_accounts_cte.qtd_accounts, 0) AS qtd_accounts, COALESCE(mtd_accounts_cte.mtd_accounts, 0) AS mtd_accounts.

validation_rules: Use DISTINCT parent_eid as the account identifier for all counts.
All 'to-date' periods must be bounded by MAX(week_end_date) from the data; do not use the system date.
Months and quarters must align strictly with the month_year and quarter_year labels in the data.
For YTD filtering, match the 2-digit year component of month_year to the 2-digit year derived from current_month_year.
Only include records with qty_sold_pu > 0.
Return the total distinct parent accounts for each period (not weekly averages).
If a period has no qualifying records, return 0 for that metric.
All metric outputs must be integers.

2026-02-11T11:08:34.884139+00:00Z.final_sql:
WITH
  max_week_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_date
    FROM drug_sales
  ),
  min_week_cte AS (
    SELECT MIN(week_end_date) AS min_week_date
    FROM drug_sales
  ),
  current_labels_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
      t.month_year AS current_month_year,
      t.quarter_year AS current_quarter_year,
      SUBSTRING_INDEX(t.month_year, '-', 1) AS current_year_yy
    FROM drug_sales t
    JOIN max_week_cte mw
      ON t.week_end_date = mw.max_week_date
  ),
  ltd_accounts_cte AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.parent_eid) AS ltd_accounts
    FROM drug_sales t
    CROSS JOIN min_week_cte mi
    CROSS JOIN max_week_cte mx
    WHERE t.qty_sold_pu > 0
      AND t.week_end_date BETWEEN mi.min_week_date AND mx.max_week_date
  ),
  ytd_accounts_cte AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.parent_eid) AS ytd_accounts
    FROM drug_sales t
    CROSS JOIN current_labels_cte cl
    CROSS JOIN max_week_cte mx
    WHERE t.qty_sold_pu > 0
      AND t.week_end_date <= mx.max_week_date
      AND SUBSTRING_INDEX(t.month_year, '-', 1) = cl.current_year_yy
  ),
  qtd_accounts_cte AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.parent_eid) AS qtd_accounts
    FROM drug_sales t
    CROSS JOIN current_labels_cte cl
    CROSS JOIN max_week_cte mx
    WHERE t.qty_sold_pu > 0
      AND t.week_end_date <= mx.max_week_date
      AND t.quarter_year = cl.current_quarter_year
  ),
  mtd_accounts_cte AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.parent_eid) AS mtd_accounts
    FROM drug_sales t
    CROSS JOIN current_labels_cte cl
    CROSS JOIN max_week_cte mx
    WHERE t.qty_sold_pu > 0
      AND t.week_end_date <= mx.max_week_date
      AND t.month_year = cl.current_month_year
  )
SELECT
  COALESCE(l.ltd_accounts, 0) AS ltd_accounts,
  COALESCE(y.ytd_accounts, 0) AS ytd_accounts,
  COALESCE(q.qtd_accounts, 0) AS qtd_accounts,
  COALESCE(m.mtd_accounts, 0) AS mtd_accounts
FROM ltd_accounts_cte l
CROSS JOIN ytd_accounts_cte y
CROSS JOIN qtd_accounts_cte q
CROSS JOIN mtd_accounts_cte m;

2026-02-12T11:08:55.895364+00:00Z.question: how many child accounts ordered our product in LTD, YTD, MTD and QTD

query_decomposition.intent_summary: Count distinct child accounts that placed order in Launch-to-Date (LTD), Year-to-Date (YTD), Month-to-Date (MTD), and Quarter-to-Date (QTD) periods, using the most recent date in the dataset to define current periods and aligning months/quarters to the month_year and quarter_year labels.

subqueries.name: max_date_cte

subqueries.name: launch_date_cte

subqueries.name: current_period_labels_cte

If multiple rows exist, return a single row using MAX(month_year) AS current_month_label and MAX(quarter_year) AS current_quarter_label.

subqueries.name: ltd_children_cte
subqueries.purpose: List unique child accounts that ordered in LTD.
subqueries.logic: Select DISTINCT child_eid from drug_sales where shipt_dt BETWEEN launch_shipt_dt (from launch_date_cte) AND max_shipt_dt (from max_date_cte) and qty_sold_pu > 0.

subqueries.name: qtd_children_cte
subqueries.purpose: List unique child accounts that ordered in the current QTD, aligned to quarter_year.
subqueries.logic: Select DISTINCT child_eid from drug_sales where quarter_year = current_quarter_label (from current_period_labels_cte) and shipt_dt <= max_shipt_dt (from max_date_cte) and qty_sold_pu > 0.

subqueries.name: ytd_children_cte
subqueries.purpose: List unique child accounts that ordered in the current YTD, aligned to the current year present in month_year.
subqueries.logic: Derive current two-digit year suffix (current_yy) from current_month_label (from current_period_labels_cte) by taking the substring after the hyphen. Select DISTINCT child_eid from drug_sales where RIGHT(month_year, 2) = current_yy and shipt_dt <= max_shipt_dt (from max_date_cte) and qty_sold_pu > 0.

subqueries.name: final_counts_cte
subqueries.purpose: Produce period-wise counts as a single row.
subqueries.logic: Select (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ltd_children_cte) AS child_accounts_LTD, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ytd_children_cte) AS child_accounts_YTD, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mtd_children_cte) AS child_accounts_MTD, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qtd_children_cte) AS child_accounts_QTD.

validation_rules: Do not use system date; compute current periods relative to MAX(shipt_dt).
MTD must filter by month_year equal to the label corresponding to MAX(shipt_dt).
QTD must filter by quarter_year equal to the label corresponding to MAX(shipt_dt).
YTD must include rows where the year suffix of month_year matches the year suffix of the current month label, and only up to MAX(shipt_dt).
LTD must span from MIN(shipt_dt) to MAX(shipt_dt).
Count distinct child_eid values only; a child account counted once per period regardless of multiple orders.
Exclude non-orders by requiring qty_sold_pu > 0.
Return all counts as integers (no decimals).
No comparisons or growth metrics are requested; do not normalize by weeks.

2026-02-12T11:08:55.895364+00:00Z.final_sql:
WITH
max_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(shipt_dt) AS max_shipt_dt
  FROM drug_sales
),
launch_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MIN(shipt_dt) AS launch_shipt_dt
  FROM drug_sales
),
current_period_labels_cte AS (
  SELECT
    MAX(month_year) AS current_month_label,
    MAX(quarter_year) AS current_quarter_label
  FROM drug_sales
  WHERE shipt_dt = (SELECT max_shipt_dt FROM max_date_cte)
),
ltd_children_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT child_eid
  FROM drug_sales
  WHERE shipt_dt BETWEEN (SELECT launch_shipt_dt FROM launch_date_cte)
                     AND (SELECT max_shipt_dt FROM max_date_cte)
    AND qty_sold_pu > 0
),
mtd_children_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT child_eid
  FROM drug_sales
  WHERE month_year = (SELECT current_month_label FROM current_period_labels_cte)
    AND shipt_dt <= (SELECT max_shipt_dt FROM max_date_cte)
    AND qty_sold_pu > 0
),
qtd_children_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT child_eid
  FROM drug_sales
  WHERE quarter_year = (SELECT current_quarter_label FROM current_period_labels_cte)
    AND shipt_dt <= (SELECT max_shipt_dt FROM max_date_cte)
    AND qty_sold_pu > 0
),
ytd_children_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT child_eid
  FROM drug_sales
  WHERE LEFT(month_year, 2) = LEFT((SELECT current_month_label FROM current_period_labels_cte), 2)
    AND shipt_dt <= (SELECT max_shipt_dt FROM max_date_cte)
    AND qty_sold_pu > 0
),
final_counts_cte AS (
  SELECT
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ltd_children_cte) AS child_accounts_LTD,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ytd_children_cte) AS child_accounts_YTD,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mtd_children_cte) AS child_accounts_MTD,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qtd_children_cte) AS child_accounts_QTD
)
SELECT *
FROM final_counts_cte;

2026-02-12T11:23:18.648578+00:00Z.question: new account counts by each quarter since launch

query_decomposition.intent_summary: Return the count of new parent accounts by quarter from product launch (earliest shipment date) through the most recent available quarter.

subqueries.name: launch_date_cte
subqueries.purpose: Define the launch start date for LTD window
subqueries.logic: Compute MIN(shipt_dt) from drug_sales to represent the product launch start date

subqueries.name: first_txn_per_parent_cte
subqueries.purpose: Identify the first shipment date for each parent account across all its child accounts
subqueries.logic: For each parent_eid, compute MIN(shipt_dt) as first_shipment_dt

subqueries.name: first_quarter_per_parent_cte
subqueries.purpose: Map each parent's first shipment date to its quarter label
subqueries.logic: Join drug_sales to first_txn_per_parent_cte on parent_eid and shipt_dt = first_shipment_dt; select DISTINCT parent_eid and the corresponding quarter_year as first_quarter_year (one row per parent)

validation_rules: Define 'account' as parent_eid; a 'new account' is a parent_eid whose first shipment occurs in the given quarter.
Use MIN(shipt_dt) to determine each parent's first shipment date, considering all child accounts under the parent.
Derive quarter labels from the quarter_year value on the row(s) matching each parent's first shipment date.
Ensure one row per parent in first_quarter_per_parent_cte (use DISTINCT) to avoid duplicate counting.
Quarters must align strictly with the quarter_year column; do not derive quarters from system dates.
Timeframe is Launch-to-Date (from MIN(shipt_dt) to the most recent available quarter in the data); do not default to a 52-week window.
All metric outputs must be rounded to zero decimal places and returned as integers.
Do not use system date; all boundaries must be data-driven.
All child entities roll up to their respective parent entities when determining first shipment at the parent level.

2026-02-12T11:23:18.648578+00:00Z.final_sql:
WITH
launch_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MIN(shipt_dt) AS launch_dt
  FROM drug_sales
),
first_txn_per_parent_cte AS (
  SELECT parent_eid, MIN(shipt_dt) AS first_shipment_dt
  FROM drug_sales
  GROUP BY parent_eid
),
first_quarter_per_parent_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT f.parent_eid, t.quarter_year AS first_quarter_year
  FROM first_txn_per_parent_cte f
  JOIN drug_sales t
    ON t.parent_eid = f.parent_eid
   AND t.shipt_dt = f.first_shipment_dt
)
SELECT q.first_quarter_year,
       COUNT(q.parent_eid) AS new_parent_account_count
FROM first_quarter_per_parent_cte q
GROUP BY q.first_quarter_year
ORDER BY q.first_quarter_year ASC;

2026-02-12T11:33:21.559028+00:00Z.question: how many accounts ordered drug every quarter

query_decomposition.intent_summary: Count the number of unique parent accounts (parent_eid) that ordered drug in every quarter across all available data.

subqueries.name: distinct_parents_per_quarter
subqueries.purpose: Ensure each parent account is counted at most once per quarter before aggregation.
subqueries.logic: From the base filtered dataset (qty_sold_pu > 0), select distinct pairs of (quarter_year, parent_eid) to represent one ordering event per parent per quarter.

subqueries.name: quarter_order_cte
subqueries.purpose: Provide chronological ordering of quarters in the final output.
subqueries.logic: From the same filtered dataset (qty_sold_pu > 0), compute MIN(week_end_date) per quarter_year as min_week_end_date to use for chronological ordering.

validation_rules: Include all available quarters in the dataset; do not apply any date window filters.
Only include records with qty_sold_pu > 0.
Deduplicate on (quarter_year, parent_eid) before counting to ensure unique parent accounts per quarter.
Quarters must align with the quarter_year column.
Order quarters chronologically using MIN(week_end_date) per quarter_year.
All metric outputs must be integers (rounded to zero decimal places).
All child entities roll up to their respective parent entities; counting must be performed at the parent_eid level.

2026-02-12T11:33:21.559028+00:00Z.final_sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT quarter_year, parent_eid, week_end_date
  FROM drug_sales
  WHERE qty_sold_pu > 0
),
distinct_parents_per_quarter AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT quarter_year, parent_eid
  FROM base
),
quarter_order_cte AS (
  SELECT quarter_year, MIN(week_end_date) AS min_week_end_date
  FROM base
  GROUP BY quarter_year
),
counts AS (
  SELECT quarter_year, COUNT(parent_eid) AS parent_accounts_ordered
  FROM distinct_parents_per_quarter
  GROUP BY quarter_year
)
SELECT c.quarter_year, c.parent_accounts_ordered
FROM counts c
JOIN quarter_order_cte q ON q.quarter_year = c.quarter_year
ORDER BY q.min_week_end_date ASC;

2026-02-12T11:51:48.485324+00:00Z.question: cumulative number of accounts that ordered drug since launch by quarter?

query_decomposition.intent_summary: Return the cumulative number of unique parent accounts that have ordered drug since launch, reported by quarter in true chronological order.

subqueries.name: eligible_orders_cte
subqueries.purpose: Restrict to real orders and keep only necessary fields for downstream logic.
subqueries.logic: Select parent_eid, shipt_dt, quarter_year from drug_sales where qty_sold_pu > 0.

subqueries.name: quarters_cte
subqueries.purpose: Create an ordered set of quarters since launch with a true chronological key.
subqueries.logic: From eligible_orders_cte, for each quarter_year compute quarter_start_dt = MIN(shipt_dt). Output distinct quarter_year, quarter_start_dt. This defines 'since launch' as the earliest quarter present in the filtered data. Ensure uniqueness per quarter_year.

subqueries.name: parent_first_order_cte
subqueries.purpose: Determine each parent account's first order date and its corresponding quarter, plus a chronological key for accurate comparisons.
subqueries.logic: From eligible_orders_cte, compute first_order_date = MIN(shipt_dt) per parent_eid. Join back to eligible_orders_cte on parent_eid and shipt_dt = first_order_date to retrieve the first_order_quarter_label (quarter_year). Then join to quarters_cte on quarter_year = first_order_quarter_label to derive first_order_quarter_start_dt. Output one row per parent_eid: parent_eid, first_order_date, first_order_quarter_label, first_order_quarter_start_dt. Deduplicate at parent_eid level if multiple rows exist on the same first_order_date.

subqueries.name: cumulative_by_quarter_cte
subqueries.purpose: Compute cumulative unique parent counts up to and including each quarter using a date-based comparison.
subqueries.logic: For each quarter in quarters_cte (q), count rows from parent_first_order_cte (p) where p.first_order_quarter_start_dt <= q.quarter_start_dt. Output: quarter_year = q.quarter_year, quarter_start_dt = q.quarter_start_dt, cumulative_parent_accounts = COUNT(p.parent_eid).

validation_rules: Default entity level is parent; deduplicate using parent_eid.
Only include rows with qty_sold_pu > 0 to reflect actual orders.
Determine each parent's first order using MIN(shipt_dt); map that date to its quarter via quarter_year from the same row.
Do NOT compare quarter_year labels lexicographically. Always compare using derived quarter_start_dt.
Quarters must be ordered chronologically using quarter_start_dt derived as MIN(shipt_dt) per quarter_year.
Cumulative counts must be non-decreasing across quarters.
Use shipt_dt and quarter_year for quarter-based calculations; do not use system date.
All metric outputs must be rounded to zero decimal places and returned as integers.

2026-02-12T11:51:48.485324+00:00Z.final_sql:
WITH eligible_orders_cte AS (
  SELECT parent_eid, shipt_dt, quarter_year
  FROM drug_sales
  WHERE qty_sold_pu > 0
),
quarters_cte AS (
  SELECT quarter_year, MIN(shipt_dt) AS quarter_start_dt
  FROM eligible_orders_cte
  GROUP BY quarter_year
),
parent_min_date AS (
  SELECT parent_eid, MIN(shipt_dt) AS first_order_date
  FROM eligible_orders_cte
  GROUP BY parent_eid
),
parent_first_order_labeled AS (
  SELECT
    pmd.parent_eid,
    pmd.first_order_date,
    MIN(e.quarter_year) AS first_order_quarter_label
  FROM parent_min_date pmd
  JOIN eligible_orders_cte e
    ON e.parent_eid = pmd.parent_eid
   AND e.shipt_dt = pmd.first_order_date
  GROUP BY pmd.parent_eid, pmd.first_order_date
),
parent_first_order_cte AS (
  SELECT
    p.parent_eid,
    p.first_order_date,
    p.first_order_quarter_label,
    q.quarter_start_dt AS first_order_quarter_start_dt
  FROM parent_first_order_labeled p
  JOIN quarters_cte q
    ON q.quarter_year = p.first_order_quarter_label
),
cumulative_by_quarter_cte AS (
  SELECT
    q.quarter_year,
    q.quarter_start_dt,
    COUNT(p.parent_eid) AS cumulative_parent_accounts
  FROM quarters_cte q
  LEFT JOIN parent_first_order_cte p
    ON p.first_order_quarter_start_dt <= q.quarter_start_dt
  GROUP BY q.quarter_year, q.quarter_start_dt
)
SELECT
  quarter_year,
  MAX(cumulative_parent_accounts) AS cumulative_parent_accounts
FROM cumulative_by_quarter_cte
GROUP BY quarter_year
ORDER BY MAX(quarter_start_dt) ASC;

2026-02-12T12:04:04.889066+00:00Z.question: what is the proportion of new vs continuing accounts in the recent completed quarter?

query_decomposition.intent_summary: Compute the proportion (share) of New vs Continuing parent accounts among parents that had shipments in the most recent completed quarter.

subqueries.name: max_shipt_date_cte
subqueries.purpose: Identify the most recent shipment date in the dataset
subqueries.logic: Select MAX(shipt_dt) as max_shipt_dt from drug_sales

subqueries.name: current_quarter_year_cte
subqueries.purpose: Find the quarter label for the most recent shipment date
subqueries.logic: Select DISTINCT quarter_year as current_quarter_year from drug_sales where shipt_dt = (select max_shipt_dt from max_shipt_date_cte) limit 1

subqueries.name: recent_completed_quarter_cte
subqueries.purpose: Determine the most recent completed quarter label
subqueries.logic: Derive the immediately preceding quarter label from current_quarter_year_cte: if current is Q1-YY then previous is Q4-(YY-1), else Q(n-1)-YY. Return a single row with column recent_completed_quarter.

subqueries.name: parent_first_ship_cte
subqueries.purpose: Determine each parent's first shipment date and its first shipment quarter
subqueries.logic: For each parent_eid, compute first_shipt_dt = MIN(shipt_dt). Join drug_sales on parent_eid and shipt_dt = first_shipt_dt to obtain first_quarter_year. Project DISTINCT parent_eid, first_shipt_dt, first_quarter_year to avoid duplication.

subqueries.name: parents_in_recent_completed_quarter_cte
subqueries.purpose: List distinct parents that had any shipment in the recent completed quarter
subqueries.logic: Select DISTINCT parent_eid from drug_sales where quarter_year = (select recent_completed_quarter from recent_completed_quarter_cte)

subqueries.name: classified_parents_cte
subqueries.purpose: Classify parents as New or Continuing within the recent completed quarter
subqueries.logic: CROSS JOIN recent_completed_quarter_cte to bring in the scalar recent_completed_quarter, then join parents_in_recent_completed_quarter_cte to parent_first_ship_cte on parent_eid. For each parent, set account_status = 'New' if first_quarter_year = recent_completed_quarter, else 'Continuing'. Project parent_eid and account_status with one row per parent.

subqueries.name: counts_cte
subqueries.purpose: Count parents by account_status for the recent completed quarter
subqueries.logic: From classified_parents_cte, group by account_status and compute account_count = COUNT(parent_eid)

subqueries.name: total_counts_cte
subqueries.purpose: Provide a single-row total to avoid ONLY_FULL_GROUP_BY violations in final projection
subqueries.logic: Select SUM(account_count) as total_accounts from counts_cte

subqueries.name: proportions_cte
subqueries.purpose: Compute percentage share for each status and attach the recent completed quarter label
subqueries.logic: Select from counts_cte CROSS JOIN total_counts_cte CROSS JOIN recent_completed_quarter_cte. For each row, compute account_proportion = CASE WHEN total_accounts = 0 THEN '0%' ELSE CONCAT(ROUND((account_count / total_accounts) * 100, 0), '%') END. Include recent_completed_quarter for all rows.

validation_rules: Default to parent-level entities: use parent_eid for account identification and roll up all child activity to the parent.
Never use system date; derive the target quarter strictly from data: recent completed quarter is the quarter immediately preceding the quarter containing MAX(shipt_dt).
Time logic must use shipt_dt and its derived reference quarter_year.
Only include parents that had at least one shipment in the recent completed quarter when computing counts and proportions.
Define 'New' as parent accounts whose first_quarter_year equals the recent completed quarter; otherwise classify as 'Continuing'.
When bringing in scalar values (recent_completed_quarter and total_accounts), use explicit CROSS JOINs to avoid missing ON clauses.
Ensure all non-aggregated selected columns are either grouped or sourced from single-row CTEs (via CROSS JOIN) to comply with ONLY_FULL_GROUP_BY.
Use DISTINCT in parent_first_ship_cte after joining on first_shipt_dt to prevent duplicate parent rows.
Percentages must be rounded to 0 decimals and returned as integers with a '%' suffix.
If total_accounts is 0, return both statuses with account_count = 0 and account_proportion = '0%'.

2026-02-12T12:04:04.889066+00:00Z.final_sql:
WITH
filtered_sales AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM drug_sales
  WHERE qty_sold_pu > 0
),
max_shipt_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(shipt_dt) AS max_shipt_dt
  FROM filtered_sales
),
current_quarter_year_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT quarter_year AS current_quarter_year
  FROM filtered_sales
  WHERE shipt_dt = (SELECT max_shipt_dt FROM max_shipt_date_cte)
  LIMIT 1
),
recent_completed_quarter_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN qnum = 1 THEN CONCAT('Q4-', LPAD(MOD(y_int + 99, 100), 2, '0'))
      ELSE CONCAT('Q', qnum - 1, '-', y_str)
    END AS recent_completed_quarter
  FROM (
    SELECT
      CAST(SUBSTRING(current_quarter_year, 2, LOCATE('-', current_quarter_year) - 2) AS UNSIGNED) AS qnum,
      CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(current_quarter_year, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED) AS y_int,
      LPAD(SUBSTRING_INDEX(current_quarter_year, '-', -1), 2, '0') AS y_str
    FROM current_quarter_year_cte
  ) q
),
first_ship_min_cte AS (
  SELECT parent_eid, MIN(shipt_dt) AS first_shipt_dt
  FROM filtered_sales
  GROUP BY parent_eid
),
parent_first_ship_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT t.parent_eid, f.first_shipt_dt, t.quarter_year AS first_quarter_year
  FROM first_ship_min_cte f
  JOIN filtered_sales t
    ON t.parent_eid = f.parent_eid
   AND t.shipt_dt = f.first_shipt_dt
),
parents_in_recent_completed_quarter_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT t.parent_eid
  FROM filtered_sales t
  CROSS JOIN recent_completed_quarter_cte r
  WHERE t.quarter_year = r.recent_completed_quarter
),
classified_parents_cte AS (
  SELECT
    p.parent_eid,
    CASE
      WHEN f.first_quarter_year = r.recent_completed_quarter THEN 'New'
      ELSE 'Continuing'
    END AS account_status
  FROM parents_in_recent_completed_quarter_cte p
  JOIN parent_first_ship_cte f
    ON p.parent_eid = f.parent_eid
  CROSS JOIN recent_completed_quarter_cte r
),
counts_cte AS (
  SELECT
    account_status,
    COUNT(parent_eid) AS account_count
  FROM classified_parents_cte
  GROUP BY account_status
),
statuses_cte AS (
  SELECT 'New' AS account_status
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Continuing' AS account_status
),
total_counts_cte AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(account_count), 0) AS total_accounts
  FROM counts_cte
),
proportions_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.recent_completed_quarter,
    s.account_status,
    COALESCE(c.account_count, 0) AS account_count,
    CASE
      WHEN t.total_accounts = 0 THEN '0%'
      ELSE CONCAT(ROUND((COALESCE(c.account_count, 0) / NULLIF(t.total_accounts, 0)) * 100, 0), '%')
    END AS account_proportion
  FROM statuses_cte s
  CROSS JOIN total_counts_cte t
  CROSS JOIN recent_completed_quarter_cte r
  LEFT JOIN counts_cte c
    ON c.account_status = s.account_status
)
SELECT recent_completed_quarter, account_status, account_count, account_proportion
FROM proportions_cte;

2026-02-13T16:14:13.201179+00:00Z.question: Show Q4 2024 new accounts by account type with contribution to total?

query_decomposition.intent_summary: Identify new parent accounts whose first-ever shipment occurred in Q4 2024, aggregate the count by parent account type (with required type merging), and compute each type's contribution to the total new accounts.

subqueries.name: base_valid_sales
subqueries.purpose: Restrict data to valid shipments only
subqueries.logic: Select all rows from drug_sales where qty_sold_pu > 0

subqueries.name: first_ship_date_by_parent
subqueries.purpose: Determine each parent's first-ever shipment date
subqueries.logic: From base_valid_sales, group by parent_eid and compute MIN(shipt_dt) as first_shipt_dt

subqueries.name: first_quarter_by_parent
subqueries.purpose: Attach quarter label and raw parent account type to the first shipment
subqueries.logic: Join base_valid_sales to first_ship_date_by_parent on parent_eid and shipt_dt = first_shipt_dt to retrieve quarter_year as first_quarter and parent_account_type as parent_account_type_raw for each parent_eid

subqueries.name: merged_account_type_by_parent
subqueries.purpose: Normalize parent account types per business rules
subqueries.logic: For each row in first_quarter_by_parent, derive parent_account_type_merged using mapping: if parent_account_type_raw = 'Other' then 'IDN/Hospital'; if parent_account_type_raw = 'Unknown' then 'Community'; else parent_account_type_raw

subqueries.name: new_parents_q4_24
subqueries.purpose: Identify new parents in Q4 2024
subqueries.logic: Filter merged_account_type_by_parent where first_quarter = 'Q4-24'; select distinct parent_eid with parent_account_type_merged

subqueries.name: counts_by_type
subqueries.purpose: Compute new account counts by merged parent account type
subqueries.logic: From new_parents_q4_24, group by parent_account_type_merged and compute COUNT(*) as new_accounts

subqueries.name: total_new
subqueries.purpose: Compute total number of new parent accounts in Q4 2024
subqueries.logic: From new_parents_q4_24, compute COUNT(*) as total_new_accounts

subqueries.name: final_calculation
subqueries.purpose: Calculate contribution to total by account type and prepare final output
subqueries.logic: Join counts_by_type with total_new (cross join) to compute contribution_to_total = ROUND(100.0 * new_accounts / NULLIF(total_new_accounts, 0), 0); ensure integer rounding and format contribution as a percentage string with '%' appended

validation_rules: Default to parent level for all logic (use parent_eid/parent_account_type).
Use shipt_dt to determine first-ever shipment and quarter_year to match Q4-24.
All computations must use only records where qty_sold_pu > 0.
Define a new account as a parent_eid whose MIN(shipt_dt) falls in quarter_year = 'Q4-24'.
For parent account type metrics, merge 'Other' into 'IDN/Hospital' and 'Unknown' into 'Community' before aggregation.
Count distinct parents by grouping unique parent_eid in new_parents_q4_24; no double counting.
Contribution to total must be computed as (new_accounts / total_new_accounts) * 100, rounded to 0 decimals, returned as an integer, and appended with '%'.
Handle divide-by-zero by returning contribution_to_total = '0%'.
No system date usage; quarter filter must rely on quarter_year = 'Q4-24'.
Final sorting should be by new_accounts in descending order.

WITH
base_valid_sales AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM drug_sales
  WHERE qty_sold_pu > 0
),
first_ship_date_by_parent AS (
  SELECT parent_eid, MIN(shipt_dt) AS first_shipt_dt
  FROM base_valid_sales
  GROUP BY parent_eid
),
first_quarter_by_parent AS (
  SELECT b.parent_eid,
         b.quarter_year AS first_quarter,
         b.parent_account_type AS parent_account_type_raw
  FROM base_valid_sales b
  INNER JOIN first_ship_date_by_parent f
    ON b.parent_eid = f.parent_eid
   AND b.shipt_dt = f.first_shipt_dt
),
merged_account_type_by_parent AS (
  SELECT
    parent_eid,
    first_quarter,
    CASE
      WHEN parent_account_type_raw = 'Other' THEN 'IDN/Hospital'
      WHEN parent_account_type_raw = 'Unknown' THEN 'Community'
      ELSE parent_account_type_raw
    END AS parent_account_type_merged
  FROM first_quarter_by_parent
),
new_parents_q4_24 AS (
  SELECT
    parent_eid,
    MAX(parent_account_type_merged) AS parent_account_type_merged
  FROM merged_account_type_by_parent
  WHERE first_quarter = 'Q4-24'
  GROUP BY parent_eid
),
counts_by_type AS (
  SELECT parent_account_type_merged, COUNT(*) AS new_accounts
  FROM new_parents_q4_24
  GROUP BY parent_account_type_merged
),
total_new AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_new_accounts
  FROM new_parents_q4_24
)
SELECT
  c.parent_account_type_merged,
  c.new_accounts,
  CONCAT(COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * c.new_accounts / NULLIF(t.total_new_accounts, 0), 0), 0), '%') AS contribution_to_total
FROM counts_by_type c
CROSS JOIN total_new t
ORDER BY c.new_accounts DESC;

2026-02-16T16:18:20.205352+00:00Z.question: Provide the top 15 parent accounts by sales contribution over the most recent 52 weeks?

query_decomposition.intent_summary: Return the top 15 parent accounts by sales contribution over the most recent 52 weeks, where contribution is each parent’s share of national sales in that window.

subqueries.name: max_date_cte
subqueries.purpose: Identify the most recent week_end_date in the dataset.
subqueries.logic: Compute MAX(week_end_date) from drug_sales.

subqueries.name: parent_sales_52w_cte
subqueries.purpose: Aggregate sales units by parent account across the most recent 52 weeks.
subqueries.logic: From drug_sales, filter records where week_end_date >= (MAX week_end_date from max_date_cte minus 51 weeks) and qty_sold_pu > 0. Group by parent_eid and parent_name, compute SUM(qty_sold_pu) as parent_sales_units_52w.

subqueries.name: total_sales_52w_cte
subqueries.purpose: Compute the national total sales units over the most recent 52 weeks for use as the contribution denominator.
subqueries.logic: From drug_sales, filter records where week_end_date >= (MAX week_end_date from max_date_cte minus 51 weeks) and qty_sold_pu > 0. Compute SUM(qty_sold_pu) as total_sales_units (single-row result).

subqueries.name: contribution_calc_cte
subqueries.purpose: Calculate each parent account’s percentage contribution to national sales and prepare the result set for ranking.
subqueries.logic: Join parent_sales_52w_cte to total_sales_52w_cte (cross join). For each parent, compute contribution_percent = ROUND((parent_sales_units_52w / NULLIF(total_sales_units, 0)) * 100, 0). If total_sales_units is 0 or NULL, set contribution_percent to 0. Append '%' to the displayed contribution value in the final output.

validation_rules: Rolling window must be relative to MAX(week_end_date) derived from the data; do not use system date.
Apply the 52-week filter using week_end_date.
Restrict all computations to records where qty_sold_pu > 0.
Default to parent entity level: group and rank by parent_eid and parent_name.
Use national total sales over the same 52-week window as the denominator.
Compute contribution as (parent_sales_units_52w / total_sales_units) * 100, round to 0 decimals (integer), and append '%'.
If total_sales_units equals 0, set contribution to '0%'.
Return only the top 15 rows after ordering by contribution_percent DESC (then parent_sales_units_52w DESC, then parent_name ASC).
All metric outputs must be rounded to zero decimal places and returned as integers.

2026-02-16T16:18:20.205352+00:00Z.final_sql:
WITH
max_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM drug_sales
),
parent_sales_52w_cte AS (
  SELECT
    ts.parent_eid,
    ts.parent_name,
    SUM(ts.qty_sold_pu) AS parent_sales_units_52w
  FROM drug_sales ts
  WHERE ts.qty_sold_pu > 0
    AND ts.week_end_date >= DATE_SUB((SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_date_cte), INTERVAL 51 WEEK)
  GROUP BY ts.parent_eid, ts.parent_name
),
total_sales_52w_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(ts.qty_sold_pu) AS total_sales_units
  FROM drug_sales ts
  WHERE ts.qty_sold_pu > 0
    AND ts.week_end_date >= DATE_SUB((SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_date_cte), INTERVAL 51 WEEK)
),
contribution_calc_cte AS (
  SELECT
    ps.parent_eid,
    ps.parent_name,
    ps.parent_sales_units_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(ts.total_sales_units, 0) = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE ROUND((ps.parent_sales_units_52w / NULLIF(ts.total_sales_units, 0)) * 100, 0)
    END AS contribution_percent
  FROM parent_sales_52w_cte ps
  CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_sales_units), 0) AS total_sales_units
    FROM total_sales_52w_cte
  ) ts
)
SELECT
  cc.parent_eid,
  cc.parent_name,
  cc.parent_sales_units_52w,
  CONCAT(cc.contribution_percent, '%') AS contribution_percent
FROM contribution_calc_cte cc
ORDER BY cc.contribution_percent DESC, cc.parent_sales_units_52w DESC, cc.parent_name ASC
LIMIT 15;

2026-02-16T16:34:03.378289+00:00Z.question: Among the top 15 parent accounts by sales contribution in the most recent 52 weeks, estimate the growth in recent 13 weeks and compare it to nation?

query_decomposition.intent_summary: Identify the top 15 parent accounts by 52-week sales contribution (most recent 52 weeks), then calculate each parent’s 13-week growth and compare it to national growth, including underlying sales volumes for 52-week and 13-week periods.

subqueries.name: max_date_cte
subqueries.purpose: Identify the most recent week_end_date in the dataset
subqueries.logic: Compute MAX(week_end_date) from drug_sales filtered to qty_sold_pu > 0

subqueries.name: window_bounds_cte
subqueries.purpose: Derive date boundaries for 52-week and two 13-week windows from the max date
subqueries.logic: Using max_date from max_date_cte: 52W window = [max_date - 51 weeks, max_date] inclusive; current 13W window = [max_date - 12 weeks, max_date] inclusive; previous 13W window = [max_date - 25 weeks, max_date - 13 weeks] inclusive

subqueries.name: sales_52wk_by_parent
subqueries.purpose: Compute parent-level sales in the most recent 52 weeks
subqueries.logic: Sum qty_sold_pu grouped by parent_eid, parent_name where week_end_date is within 52W bounds and qty_sold_pu > 0

subqueries.name: sales_52wk_total
subqueries.purpose: Compute national total sales in the most recent 52 weeks
subqueries.logic: Sum qty_sold_pu across all rows where week_end_date is within 52W bounds and qty_sold_pu > 0

subqueries.name: contribution_rank_cte
subqueries.purpose: Calculate each parent’s 52W contribution to national and rank to get top 15
subqueries.logic: For each parent in sales_52wk_by_parent, compute contribution_52wk_pct = (parent_52wk_sales / total_52wk_sales) * 100 using sales_52wk_total; rank parents by contribution_52wk_pct DESC; select top 15 parents including parent_52wk_sales and total_52wk_sales

subqueries.name: parent_curr_13wk_cte
subqueries.purpose: Compute current 13-week sales for top 15 parents
subqueries.logic: For parents restricted to contribution_rank_cte top 15, sum qty_sold_pu grouped by parent_eid where week_end_date is within current 13W bounds and qty_sold_pu > 0

subqueries.name: parent_prev_13wk_cte
subqueries.purpose: Compute previous 13-week sales for top 15 parents
subqueries.logic: For parents restricted to contribution_rank_cte top 15, sum qty_sold_pu grouped by parent_eid where week_end_date is within previous 13W bounds and qty_sold_pu > 0

subqueries.name: parent_growth_cte
subqueries.purpose: Calculate 13-week growth for each of the top 15 parents
subqueries.logic: Join parent_curr_13wk_cte and parent_prev_13wk_cte on parent_eid; compute parent_13wk_growth_pct with rule: if prev=0 and curr>0 then 100, else if prev=0 and curr=0 then 0, else ((curr - prev) / prev) * 100

subqueries.name: national_13wk_cte
subqueries.purpose: Compute national current and previous 13-week sales
subqueries.logic: national_curr_13wk_sales = sum qty_sold_pu where week_end_date is within current 13W bounds and qty_sold_pu > 0; national_prev_13wk_sales = sum qty_sold_pu where week_end_date is within previous 13W bounds and qty_sold_pu > 0

subqueries.name: national_growth_cte
subqueries.purpose: Calculate national 13-week growth
subqueries.logic: Using national_13wk_cte totals, compute national_13wk_growth_pct with rule: if prev=0 and curr>0 then 100, else if prev=0 and curr=0 then 0, else ((curr - prev) / prev) * 100

subqueries.name: final_join_cte
subqueries.purpose: Assemble final result for top 15 parents with contributions, growth vs national, and sales volumes
subqueries.logic: Join contribution_rank_cte (top 15 with parent_52wk_sales and total_52wk_sales) to parent_growth_cte to bring parent_curr_13wk_sales, parent_prev_13wk_sales, and parent_13wk_growth_pct; join to national_13wk_cte to bring national_curr_13wk_sales and national_prev_13wk_sales; join or cross join to national_growth_cte to bring national_13wk_growth_pct; compute delta_vs_national_pp = parent_13wk_growth_pct - national_13wk_growth_pct

validation_rules: All calculations must restrict to rows where qty_sold_pu > 0.
Derive MAX(week_end_date) from the data; do not use system date.
Rolling windows must be relative to MAX(week_end_date).
52W window = last 52 weeks inclusive of MAX(week_end_date).
Current 13W window = last 13 weeks inclusive of MAX(week_end_date).
Previous 13W window = the 13 weeks immediately preceding the current 13W window.
Compute 52W contribution as parent_52wk_sales divided by total_52wk_sales (national 52W sales).
Growth formula: if previous period = 0 and current > 0, report 100%; if previous = 0 and current = 0, report 0%; otherwise ((current - previous) / previous) * 100.
If any periods being compared are not equal in length, normalize to average per week before comparison. (Here both 13W windows are equal length.)
Use week_end_date for all weekly time logic.
Default to parent-level aggregation; group and present results at parent_eid/parent_name.
Limit final result to the top 15 parents ranked by 52W contribution, ordered descending by contribution.
Include sales volumes in output: parent_52wk_sales, total_52wk_sales, parent_curr_13wk_sales, parent_prev_13wk_sales, national_curr_13wk_sales, national_prev_13wk_sales.
All growth and contribution outputs must be rounded to zero decimal places and formatted as integers with a trailing '%'.
All volume outputs (sales) must be rounded to zero decimal places and returned as integers.
Delta vs national (delta_vs_national_pp) must be rounded to zero decimal places as an integer; do not append a '%' symbol to delta.

2026-02-16T16:34:03.378289+00:00Z.final_sql:
WITH max_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM drug_sales
  WHERE qty_sold_pu > 0
),
window_bounds_cte AS (
  SELECT
    m.max_week_end_date AS max_week_end_date,
    DATE_SUB(m.max_week_end_date, INTERVAL 51 WEEK) AS start_52wk,
    DATE_SUB(m.max_week_end_date, INTERVAL 12 WEEK) AS start_curr_13wk,
    DATE_SUB(m.max_week_end_date, INTERVAL 25 WEEK) AS start_prev_13wk,
    DATE_SUB(m.max_week_end_date, INTERVAL 13 WEEK) AS end_prev_13wk
  FROM max_date_cte m
),
sales_52wk_by_parent AS (
  SELECT
    s.parent_eid,
    s.parent_name,
    SUM(s.qty_sold_pu) AS parent_52wk_sales
  FROM drug_sales s
  JOIN window_bounds_cte b ON 1=1
  WHERE s.qty_sold_pu > 0
    AND s.week_end_date BETWEEN b.start_52wk AND b.max_week_end_date
  GROUP BY s.parent_eid, s.parent_name
),
sales_52wk_total AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(s.qty_sold_pu) AS total_52wk_sales
  FROM drug_sales s
  JOIN window_bounds_cte b ON 1=1
  WHERE s.qty_sold_pu > 0
    AND s.week_end_date BETWEEN b.start_52wk AND b.max_week_end_date
),
contribution_rank_cte AS (
  SELECT
    p.parent_eid,
    p.parent_name,
    p.parent_52wk_sales,
    t.total_52wk_sales,
    (p.parent_52wk_sales / NULLIF(t.total_52wk_sales, 0) * 100) AS contribution_52wk_pct_num
  FROM sales_52wk_by_parent p
  CROSS JOIN sales_52wk_total t
  ORDER BY contribution_52wk_pct_num DESC
  LIMIT 15
),
parent_curr_13wk_cte AS (
  SELECT
    s.parent_eid,
    SUM(s.qty_sold_pu) AS parent_curr_13wk_sales
  FROM drug_sales s
  JOIN contribution_rank_cte r ON s.parent_eid = r.parent_eid
  JOIN window_bounds_cte b ON 1=1
  WHERE s.qty_sold_pu > 0
    AND s.week_end_date BETWEEN b.start_curr_13wk AND b.max_week_end_date
  GROUP BY s.parent_eid
),
parent_prev_13wk_cte AS (
  SELECT
    s.parent_eid,
    SUM(s.qty_sold_pu) AS parent_prev_13wk_sales
  FROM drug_sales s
  JOIN contribution_rank_cte r ON s.parent_eid = r.parent_eid
  JOIN window_bounds_cte b ON 1=1
  WHERE s.qty_sold_pu > 0
    AND s.week_end_date BETWEEN b.start_prev_13wk AND b.end_prev_13wk
  GROUP BY s.parent_eid
),
parent_growth_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.parent_eid,
    COALESCE(c.parent_curr_13wk_sales, 0) AS parent_curr_13wk_sales,
    COALESCE(p.parent_prev_13wk_sales, 0) AS parent_prev_13wk_sales,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(p.parent_prev_13wk_sales, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(c.parent_curr_13wk_sales, 0) > 0 THEN 100
      WHEN COALESCE(p.parent_prev_13wk_sales, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(c.parent_curr_13wk_sales, 0) = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE ((COALESCE(c.parent_curr_13wk_sales, 0) - COALESCE(p.parent_prev_13wk_sales, 0)) / NULLIF(p.parent_prev_13wk_sales, 0)) * 100
    END AS parent_13wk_growth_pct_num
  FROM contribution_rank_cte r
  LEFT JOIN parent_curr_13wk_cte c ON c.parent_eid = r.parent_eid
  LEFT JOIN parent_prev_13wk_cte p ON p.parent_eid = r.parent_eid
),
national_13wk_cte AS (
  SELECT
    (SELECT SUM(s.qty_sold_pu)
     FROM drug_sales s
     JOIN window_bounds_cte b2 ON 1=1
     WHERE s.qty_sold_pu > 0
       AND s.week_end_date BETWEEN b2.start_curr_13wk AND b2.max_week_end_date
    ) AS national_curr_13wk_sales,
    (SELECT SUM(s.qty_sold_pu)
     FROM drug_sales s
     JOIN window_bounds_cte b3 ON 1=1
     WHERE s.qty_sold_pu > 0
       AND s.week_end_date BETWEEN b3.start_prev_13wk AND b3.end_prev_13wk
    ) AS national_prev_13wk_sales
  FROM window_bounds_cte b
),
national_growth_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(n.national_prev_13wk_sales, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(n.national_curr_13wk_sales, 0) > 0 THEN 100
      WHEN COALESCE(n.national_prev_13wk_sales, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(n.national_curr_13wk_sales, 0) = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE ((COALESCE(n.national_curr_13wk_sales, 0) - COALESCE(n.national_prev_13wk_sales, 0)) / NULLIF(n.national_prev_13wk_sales, 0)) * 100
    END AS national_13wk_growth_pct_num
  FROM national_13wk_cte n
),
final_join_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.parent_eid,
    r.parent_name,
    r.parent_52wk_sales,
    r.total_52wk_sales,
    r.contribution_52wk_pct_num,
    g.parent_curr_13wk_sales,
    g.parent_prev_13wk_sales,
    g.parent_13wk_growth_pct_num,
    n.national_curr_13wk_sales,
    n.national_prev_13wk_sales,
    ng.national_13wk_growth_pct_num,
    (g.parent_13wk_growth_pct_num - ng.national_13wk_growth_pct_num) AS delta_vs_national_pp_num
  FROM contribution_rank_cte r
  LEFT JOIN parent_growth_cte g ON g.parent_eid = r.parent_eid
  CROSS JOIN national_13wk_cte n
  CROSS JOIN national_growth_cte ng
)
SELECT
  parent_eid,
  parent_name,
  ROUND(parent_52wk_sales, 0) AS parent_52wk_sales,
  ROUND(total_52wk_sales, 0) AS total_52wk_sales,
  CONCAT(ROUND(contribution_52wk_pct_num, 0), '%') AS contribution_52wk_pct,
  ROUND(COALESCE(parent_curr_13wk_sales, 0), 0) AS parent_curr_13wk_sales,
  ROUND(COALESCE(parent_prev_13wk_sales, 0), 0) AS parent_prev_13wk_sales,
  CONCAT(ROUND(parent_13wk_growth_pct_num, 0), '%') AS parent_13wk_growth_pct,
  ROUND(COALESCE(national_curr_13wk_sales, 0), 0) AS national_curr_13wk_sales,
  ROUND(COALESCE(national_prev_13wk_sales, 0), 0) AS national_prev_13wk_sales,
  CONCAT(ROUND(national_13wk_growth_pct_num, 0), '%') AS national_13wk_growth_pct,
  ROUND(delta_vs_national_pp_num, 0) AS delta_vs_national_pp
FROM final_join_cte
ORDER BY contribution_52wk_pct_num DESC
LIMIT 15;

2026-02-16T16:42:33.125694+00:00Z.question: Among the top 15 parent accounts by sales contribution in the most recent 52 weeks, identify any accounts that have declined in the most recent 13 weeks compared to the prior 13 weeks.

query_decomposition.intent_summary: Identify parent accounts that are in the top 15 by national sales contribution over the most recent 52 weeks and have declined in the most recent 13 weeks versus the prior 13 weeks.

subqueries.name: max_date_cte
subqueries.purpose: Identify the most recent week_end_date in the dataset
subqueries.logic: Compute MAX(week_end_date) from drug_sales

subqueries.name: mr52_cte
subqueries.purpose: Limit data to the most recent 52 weeks ending on the max week_end_date
subqueries.logic: From drug_sales, keep rows where week_end_date is between (max_date - 51 weeks) and max_date inclusive, and qty_sold_pu > 0

subqueries.name: mr13_cte
subqueries.purpose: Limit data to the most recent 13 weeks ending on the max week_end_date
subqueries.logic: From drug_sales, keep rows where week_end_date is between (max_date - 12 weeks) and max_date inclusive, and qty_sold_pu > 0

subqueries.name: pr13_cte
subqueries.purpose: Limit data to the 13 weeks immediately preceding the most recent 13 weeks window
subqueries.logic: From drug_sales, keep rows where week_end_date is between (max_date - 25 weeks) and (max_date - 13 weeks) inclusive, and qty_sold_pu > 0

subqueries.name: mr52_parent_sums
subqueries.purpose: Compute parent-level units for MR52
subqueries.logic: Group mr52_cte by parent_eid, parent_name; compute SUM(qty_sold_pu) as mr52_parent_units

subqueries.name: mr52_total_sum
subqueries.purpose: Compute national total units for MR52
subqueries.logic: Aggregate mr52_cte across all rows; compute SUM(qty_sold_pu) as mr52_total_units

subqueries.name: mr52_contribution_rank
subqueries.purpose: Calculate MR52 contribution per parent and rank to find top 15
subqueries.logic: Join mr52_parent_sums to mr52_total_sum; compute mr52_contribution_pct = 100.0 * mr52_parent_units / mr52_total_units; assign rank_by_mr52_contribution using ROW_NUMBER() over (ORDER BY mr52_contribution_pct DESC, parent_eid ASC); keep rows where rank_by_mr52_contribution <= 15

subqueries.name: mr13_parent_sums
subqueries.purpose: Compute parent-level units for MR13
subqueries.logic: Group mr13_cte by parent_eid; compute SUM(qty_sold_pu) as mr13_units

subqueries.name: pr13_parent_sums
subqueries.purpose: Compute parent-level units for PR13
subqueries.logic: Group pr13_cte by parent_eid; compute SUM(qty_sold_pu) as pr13_units

subqueries.name: top15_with_trends
subqueries.purpose: Attach MR13 and PR13 metrics to the MR52 top 15 parents and compute growth
subqueries.logic: Left join mr52_contribution_rank to mr13_parent_sums and pr13_parent_sums on parent_eid; compute growth_pct as CASE WHEN pr13_units = 0 AND mr13_units > 0 THEN 100 WHEN pr13_units = 0 AND mr13_units = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 100.0 * (mr13_units - pr13_units) / NULLIF(pr13_units, 0) END; carry forward mr52_contribution_pct and rank_by_mr52_contribution

subqueries.name: declined_top15
subqueries.purpose: Filter to only those top 15 parents that declined MR13 vs PR13
subqueries.logic: From top15_with_trends, keep rows where mr13_units < pr13_units

validation_rules: All computations must be restricted to rows with qty_sold_pu > 0.
Derive MAX(week_end_date) from data; do not use system date.
MR52 window = weeks [max_date - 51 weeks, max_date], inclusive.
MR13 window = weeks [max_date - 12 weeks, max_date], inclusive.
PR13 window = weeks [max_date - 25 weeks, max_date - 13 weeks], inclusive.
Rank parents by MR52 contribution using national MR52 total as denominator; select top 15.
Decline condition: mr13_units < pr13_units.
Growth calculation: If previous (pr13_units) is 0 and current (mr13_units) > 0, growth must be 100%; if both are 0, set growth to 0%.
All growth and contribution metrics must be expressed as percentages, rounded to 0 decimals and returned as integers with a trailing '%' in the final output.
Use week_end_date for all weekly time logic.
Operate at the parent account level; all child accounts roll up to parent.

2026-02-16T16:42:33.125694+00:00Z.final_sql:
WITH
max_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_date
  FROM drug_sales
  WHERE qty_sold_pu > 0
),
mr52_cte AS (
  SELECT s.*
  FROM drug_sales s
  JOIN max_date_cte md ON 1=1
  WHERE s.qty_sold_pu > 0
    AND s.week_end_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(md.max_date, INTERVAL 51 WEEK) AND md.max_date
),
mr13_cte AS (
  SELECT s.*
  FROM drug_sales s
  JOIN max_date_cte md ON 1=1
  WHERE s.qty_sold_pu > 0
    AND s.week_end_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(md.max_date, INTERVAL 12 WEEK) AND md.max_date
),
pr13_cte AS (
  SELECT s.*
  FROM drug_sales s
  JOIN max_date_cte md ON 1=1
  WHERE s.qty_sold_pu > 0
    AND s.week_end_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(md.max_date, INTERVAL 25 WEEK) AND DATE_SUB(md.max_date, INTERVAL 13 WEEK)
),
mr52_parent_sums AS (
  SELECT parent_eid, parent_name, SUM(qty_sold_pu) AS mr52_parent_units
  FROM mr52_cte
  GROUP BY parent_eid, parent_name
),
mr52_total_sum AS (
  SELECT SUM(qty_sold_pu) AS mr52_total_units
  FROM mr52_cte
),
mr52_contribution_rank AS (
  SELECT
    ps.parent_eid,
    ps.parent_name,
    ps.mr52_parent_units,
    ts.mr52_total_units,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      ORDER BY (100.0 * ps.mr52_parent_units / NULLIF(ts.mr52_total_units, 0)) DESC, ps.parent_eid ASC
    ) AS rank_by_mr52_contribution,
    CONCAT(ROUND(100.0 * ps.mr52_parent_units / NULLIF(ts.mr52_total_units, 0)), '%') AS mr52_contribution_pct
  FROM mr52_parent_sums ps
  CROSS JOIN mr52_total_sum ts
),
filter_top15 AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM mr52_contribution_rank
  WHERE rank_by_mr52_contribution <= 15
),
mr13_parent_sums AS (
  SELECT parent_eid, SUM(qty_sold_pu) AS mr13_units
  FROM mr13_cte
  GROUP BY parent_eid
),
pr13_parent_sums AS (
  SELECT parent_eid, SUM(qty_sold_pu) AS pr13_units
  FROM pr13_cte
  GROUP BY parent_eid
),
top15_with_trends AS (
  SELECT
    t.parent_eid,
    t.parent_name,
    t.rank_by_mr52_contribution,
    t.mr52_parent_units,
    t.mr52_total_units,
    t.mr52_contribution_pct,
    COALESCE(m13.mr13_units, 0) AS mr13_units,
    COALESCE(p13.pr13_units, 0) AS pr13_units,
    CONCAT(ROUND(
      CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(p13.pr13_units, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(m13.mr13_units, 0) > 0 THEN 100
        WHEN COALESCE(p13.pr13_units, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(m13.mr13_units, 0) = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE 100.0 * (COALESCE(m13.mr13_units, 0) - COALESCE(p13.pr13_units, 0)) / NULLIF(COALESCE(p13.pr13_units, 0), 0)
      END
    ), '%') AS growth_pct
  FROM filter_top15 t
  LEFT JOIN mr13_parent_sums m13 ON m13.parent_eid = t.parent_eid
  LEFT JOIN pr13_parent_sums p13 ON p13.parent_eid = t.parent_eid
),
declined_top15 AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM top15_with_trends
  WHERE mr13_units < pr13_units
)
SELECT
  parent_eid,
  parent_name,
  rank_by_mr52_contribution,
  mr52_parent_units,
  mr52_total_units,
  mr52_contribution_pct,
  mr13_units,
  pr13_units,
  growth_pct
FROM declined_top15
ORDER BY rank_by_mr52_contribution ASC;

2026-02-17T09:37:26.201220+00:00Z.question: what is the sales contribution of child accounts which are academic and Community?

query_decomposition.intent_summary: Compute sales contribution (as a percentage of national sales) and total sales volume for child accounts categorized as Academic and Community, merging Unknown into Community, over the most recent 52 weeks.

subqueries.name: max_date_cte
subqueries.purpose: Identify the most recent week_end_date in the dataset
subqueries.logic: Compute MAX(week_end_date) from drug_sales

subqueries.name: filtered_sales_cte
subqueries.purpose: Restrict to qty_sold_pu > 0 within the most recent 52 weeks based on max_date_cte
subqueries.logic: Select all columns from drug_sales where qty_sold_pu > 0 and week_end_date >= (MAX week_end_date from max_date_cte minus 51 weeks, inclusive)

subqueries.name: normalized_child_type_cte
subqueries.purpose: Merge Unknown into Community at the child account level
subqueries.logic: From filtered_sales_cte, derive child_account_type_merged: CASE WHEN child_account_type IN ('Community','Unknown') THEN 'Community' WHEN child_account_type = 'Academic' THEN 'Academic' END

subqueries.name: national_total_cte
subqueries.purpose: Compute national total sales over the filtered 52-week window
subqueries.logic: Sum qty_sold_pu over all rows in normalized_child_type_cte to produce national_total_sales

subqueries.name: child_type_totals_cte
subqueries.purpose: Compute total sales volume by merged child account type for Academic and Community
subqueries.logic: From normalized_child_type_cte, filter child_account_type_merged IN ('Academic','Community'); group by child_account_type_merged and sum qty_sold_pu as total_sales_volume

subqueries.name: contribution_calc
subqueries.purpose: Calculate contribution percentages and prepare final output
subqueries.logic: Join child_type_totals_cte to national_total_cte and compute contribution_percent = CASE WHEN national_total_sales = 0 THEN '0%' ELSE CONCAT(CAST(ROUND((total_sales_volume / national_total_sales) * 100, 0) AS INTEGER), '%') END

validation_rules: Use MAX(week_end_date) from data; do not use system date
Apply 52-week rolling window relative to MAX(week_end_date)
Denominator must be overall national sales over the same 52-week window and qty_sold_pu > 0, not restricted by child_account_type
Merge Unknown into Community at the child_account_type level before aggregation
Restrict numerators to merged child_account_type IN ('Academic','Community')
All computations must use week_end_date for weekly logic
All computations must be restricted to rows where qty_sold_pu > 0
Round contribution to zero decimals and append '%' in the output
If national_total_sales is 0, set contribution_percent to '0%' to avoid division by zero
Return total_sales_volume as an integer

2026-02-17T09:37:26.201220+00:00Z.final_sql:
WITH
max_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM drug_sales
),
filtered_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT s.*
  FROM drug_sales s
  CROSS JOIN max_date_cte m
  WHERE s.qty_sold_pu > 0
    AND s.week_end_date >= DATE_SUB(m.max_week_end_date, INTERVAL 51 WEEK)
),
normalized_child_type_cte AS (
  SELECT
    f.*,
    CASE
      WHEN f.child_account_type IN ('Community','Unknown') THEN 'Community'
      WHEN f.child_account_type = 'Academic' THEN 'Academic'
    END AS child_account_type_merged
  FROM filtered_sales_cte f
),
national_total_cte AS (
  SELECT SUM(qty_sold_pu) AS national_total_sales
  FROM normalized_child_type_cte
),
child_type_totals_cte AS (
  SELECT
    child_account_type_merged,
    SUM(qty_sold_pu) AS total_sales_volume
  FROM normalized_child_type_cte
  WHERE child_account_type_merged IN ('Academic','Community')
  GROUP BY child_account_type_merged
)
SELECT
  c.child_account_type_merged,
  CAST(c.total_sales_volume AS UNSIGNED) AS total_sales_volume,
  CASE
    WHEN n.national_total_sales = 0 THEN '0%'
    ELSE CONCAT(ROUND((c.total_sales_volume / NULLIF(n.national_total_sales, 0)) * 100, 0), '%')
  END AS contribution_percent
FROM child_type_totals_cte c
CROSS JOIN national_total_cte n
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN n.national_total_sales = 0 THEN 0
    ELSE ROUND((c.total_sales_volume / NULLIF(n.national_total_sales, 0)) * 100, 0)
  END DESC;

2026-02-17T09:53:23.535816+00:00Z.question: what is the sales growth in recent 4 weeks by child account type and how does that compare with nation?

query_decomposition.intent_summary: Compute percentage sales growth for the most recent 4 weeks (R4W) by child account type and show national (overall) growth for the same period as a comparison baseline.

subqueries.name: max_week_cte
subqueries.purpose: Identify the most recent week_end_date in the dataset to anchor rolling windows.
subqueries.logic: Select MAX(week_end_date) as max_week_end_date from drug_sales where qty_sold_pu > 0

subqueries.name: r4w_weeks_cte
subqueries.purpose: Get the 4 most recent distinct weeks (R4W).
subqueries.logic: From drug_sales, select the 4 most recent distinct week_end_date values less than or equal to max_week_end_date (from max_week_cte), ordered descending by week_end_date

subqueries.name: p4w_weeks_cte
subqueries.purpose: Get the 4 distinct weeks immediately preceding the R4W window (P4W).
subqueries.logic: Identify the minimum week_end_date within r4w_weeks_cte; then select the 4 distinct week_end_date values immediately prior to that minimum week, ordered descending

subqueries.name: child_type_standardization_cte
subqueries.purpose: Standardize child account type per business rules before aggregation.
subqueries.logic: Create derived_child_account_type as: CASE WHEN child_account_type = 'Unknown' THEN 'Community' WHEN child_account_type IN ('Others','Other') THEN 'IDN/Hospital' ELSE child_account_type END

subqueries.name: r4w_agg_by_child_type_cte
subqueries.purpose: Aggregate R4W sales by standardized child account type.
subqueries.logic: Join drug_sales (filtered to qty_sold_pu > 0) to r4w_weeks_cte on week_end_date; compute SUM(qty_sold_pu) grouped by derived_child_account_type from child_type_standardization_cte

subqueries.name: p4w_agg_by_child_type_cte
subqueries.purpose: Aggregate P4W sales by standardized child account type.
subqueries.logic: Join drug_sales (filtered to qty_sold_pu > 0) to p4w_weeks_cte on week_end_date; compute SUM(qty_sold_pu) grouped by derived_child_account_type from child_type_standardization_cte

subqueries.name: distinct_child_types_cte
subqueries.purpose: Ensure all standardized child types present in either window are represented, even if one period has zero.
subqueries.logic: Select distinct derived_child_account_type from child_type_standardization_cte joined to drug_sales where qty_sold_pu > 0

subqueries.name: by_child_type_combined_cte
subqueries.purpose: Combine R4W and P4W aggregates by child type and compute growth.
subqueries.logic: Left join r4w_agg_by_child_type_cte and p4w_agg_by_child_type_cte to distinct_child_types_cte on derived_child_account_type; treat missing sums as 0. Compute sales_growth_pct = CASE WHEN p4w_sales = 0 AND r4w_sales > 0 THEN 100 WHEN p4w_sales = 0 AND r4w_sales = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(((r4w_sales - p4w_sales) * 100.0) / p4w_sales, 0) END and append '%' symbol

subqueries.name: national_r4w_agg_cte
subqueries.purpose: Aggregate national (overall) R4W sales.
subqueries.logic: Join drug_sales (filtered to qty_sold_pu > 0) to r4w_weeks_cte on week_end_date and compute SUM(qty_sold_pu) as national_r4w_sales (no grouping)

subqueries.name: national_p4w_agg_cte
subqueries.purpose: Aggregate national (overall) P4W sales.
subqueries.logic: Join drug_sales (filtered to qty_sold_pu > 0) to p4w_weeks_cte on week_end_date and compute SUM(qty_sold_pu) as national_p4w_sales (no grouping)

subqueries.name: national_growth_cte
subqueries.purpose: Compute national growth for comparison.
subqueries.logic: Using national_r4w_agg_cte and national_p4w_agg_cte, compute national_growth_pct = CASE WHEN national_p4w_sales = 0 AND national_r4w_sales > 0 THEN 100 WHEN national_p4w_sales = 0 AND national_r4w_sales = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(((national_r4w_sales - national_p4w_sales) * 100.0) / national_p4w_sales, 0) END and append '%' symbol

subqueries.name: final_join_cte
subqueries.purpose: Attach national metrics to each child-type row for side-by-side comparison.
subqueries.logic: Cross join national_growth_cte to by_child_type_combined_cte so each child type row includes national_r4w_sales, national_p4w_sales, and national_growth_pct

validation_rules: All computations must only use rows where qty_sold_pu > 0.
Rolling windows (R4W and P4W) must be determined relative to MAX(week_end_date) from the data; do not use system date.
Weeks must be identified using week_end_date; select the 4 most recent distinct weeks for R4W and the 4 immediately preceding weeks for P4W.
If R4W and P4W do not contain an equal count of distinct weeks, normalize by computing weekly averages for each period before calculating growth.
Standardize child account types before aggregation: map 'Unknown' to 'Community'; if 'Others' or 'Other' appear, merge them into 'IDN/Hospital'.
Growth calculation: if previous period (P4W) is 0 and current (R4W) is > 0, set growth to 100%; if both are 0, set growth to 0%.
All growth metrics must be formatted as integer percentages with '%' appended (rounded to 0 decimals).
National comparison must be computed over the entire dataset (no grouping) using the same R4W and P4W windows.
Because the user asked for child-level information, use child_account_type only (do not substitute with parent-level fields).

2026-02-17T09:53:23.535816+00:00Z.final_sql:
WITH
max_week_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM drug_sales
  WHERE qty_sold_pu > 0
),
r4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT s.week_end_date
    FROM drug_sales s
    JOIN max_week_cte m ON 1=1
    WHERE s.qty_sold_pu > 0
      AND s.week_end_date <= m.max_week_end_date
    ORDER BY s.week_end_date DESC
    LIMIT 4
  ) x
),
r4w_min_cte AS (
  SELECT MIN(week_end_date) AS r4w_min_week
  FROM r4w_weeks_cte
),
p4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT s.week_end_date
    FROM drug_sales s
    JOIN r4w_min_cte r ON 1=1
    WHERE s.qty_sold_pu > 0
      AND s.week_end_date < r.r4w_min_week
    ORDER BY s.week_end_date DESC
    LIMIT 4
  ) y
),
weeks_count_cte AS (
  SELECT
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM r4w_weeks_cte) AS r4w_week_cnt,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p4w_weeks_cte) AS p4w_week_cnt
),
child_type_standardization_cte AS (
  SELECT
    s.*,
    CASE
      WHEN s.child_account_type = 'Unknown' THEN 'Community'
      WHEN s.child_account_type IN ('Others','Other') THEN 'IDN/Hospital'
      ELSE s.child_account_type
    END AS derived_child_account_type
  FROM drug_sales s
),
r4w_agg_by_child_type_cte AS (
  SELECT
    c.derived_child_account_type,
    SUM(c.qty_sold_pu) AS r4w_sales
  FROM child_type_standardization_cte c
  JOIN r4w_weeks_cte w ON c.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE c.qty_sold_pu > 0
  GROUP BY c.derived_child_account_type
),
p4w_agg_by_child_type_cte AS (
  SELECT
    c.derived_child_account_type,
    SUM(c.qty_sold_pu) AS p4w_sales
  FROM child_type_standardization_cte c
  JOIN p4w_weeks_cte w ON c.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE c.qty_sold_pu > 0
  GROUP BY c.derived_child_account_type
),
distinct_child_types_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    c.derived_child_account_type
  FROM child_type_standardization_cte c
  WHERE c.qty_sold_pu > 0
),
by_child_type_combined_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.derived_child_account_type,
    COALESCE(r.r4w_sales, 0) AS r4w_sales,
    COALESCE(p.p4w_sales, 0) AS p4w_sales,
    CONCAT(
      ROUND(
        CASE
          WHEN (CASE WHEN wc.p4w_week_cnt = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(p.p4w_sales, 0) / wc.p4w_week_cnt END) = 0
               AND (CASE WHEN wc.r4w_week_cnt = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(r.r4w_sales, 0) / wc.r4w_week_cnt END) > 0
            THEN 100
          WHEN (CASE WHEN wc.p4w_week_cnt = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(p.p4w_sales, 0) / wc.p4w_week_cnt END) = 0
               AND (CASE WHEN wc.r4w_week_cnt = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(r.r4w_sales, 0) / wc.r4w_week_cnt END) = 0
            THEN 0
          ELSE (
            (
              (CASE WHEN wc.r4w_week_cnt = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(r.r4w_sales, 0) / wc.r4w_week_cnt END) -
              (CASE WHEN wc.p4w_week_cnt = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(p.p4w_sales, 0) / wc.p4w_week_cnt END)
            ) * 100.0
            / NULLIF((CASE WHEN wc.p4w_week_cnt = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(p.p4w_sales, 0) / wc.p4w_week_cnt END), 0)
          )
        END
      , 0), '%'
    ) AS sales_growth_pct
  FROM distinct_child_types_cte d
  LEFT JOIN r4w_agg_by_child_type_cte r
    ON d.derived_child_account_type = r.derived_child_account_type
  LEFT JOIN p4w_agg_by_child_type_cte p
    ON d.derived_child_account_type = p.derived_child_account_type
  CROSS JOIN weeks_count_cte wc
),
national_r4w_agg_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(s.qty_sold_pu) AS national_r4w_sales
  FROM drug_sales s
  JOIN r4w_weeks_cte w ON s.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE s.qty_sold_pu > 0
),
national_p4w_agg_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(s.qty_sold_pu) AS national_p4w_sales
  FROM drug_sales s
  JOIN p4w_weeks_cte w ON s.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE s.qty_sold_pu > 0
),
national_growth_cte AS (
  SELECT
    n_r.national_r4w_sales,
    n_p.national_p4w_sales,
    CONCAT(
      ROUND(
        CASE
          WHEN (CASE WHEN wc.p4w_week_cnt = 0 THEN 0 ELSE n_p.national_p4w_sales / wc.p4w_week_cnt END) = 0
               AND (CASE WHEN wc.r4w_week_cnt = 0 THEN 0 ELSE n_r.national_r4w_sales / wc.r4w_week_cnt END) > 0
            THEN 100
          WHEN (CASE WHEN wc.p4w_week_cnt = 0 THEN 0 ELSE n_p.national_p4w_sales / wc.p4w_week_cnt END) = 0
               AND (CASE WHEN wc.r4w_week_cnt = 0 THEN 0 ELSE n_r.national_r4w_sales / wc.r4w_week_cnt END) = 0
            THEN 0
          ELSE (
            (
              (CASE WHEN wc.r4w_week_cnt = 0 THEN 0 ELSE n_r.national_r4w_sales / wc.r4w_week_cnt END) -
              (CASE WHEN wc.p4w_week_cnt = 0 THEN 0 ELSE n_p.national_p4w_sales / wc.p4w_week_cnt END)
            ) * 100.0
            / NULLIF((CASE WHEN wc.p4w_week_cnt = 0 THEN 0 ELSE n_p.national_p4w_sales / wc.p4w_week_cnt END), 0)
          )
        END
      , 0), '%'
    ) AS national_growth_pct
  FROM national_r4w_agg_cte n_r
  CROSS JOIN national_p4w_agg_cte n_p
  CROSS JOIN weeks_count_cte wc
),
final_join_cte AS (
  SELECT
    b.derived_child_account_type,
    b.r4w_sales,
    b.p4w_sales,
    b.sales_growth_pct,
    n.national_r4w_sales,
    n.national_p4w_sales,
    n.national_growth_pct
  FROM by_child_type_combined_cte b
  CROSS JOIN national_growth_cte n
)
SELECT
  derived_child_account_type,
  r4w_sales,
  p4w_sales,
  sales_growth_pct,
  national_r4w_sales,
  national_p4w_sales,
  national_growth_pct
FROM final_join_cte
ORDER BY derived_child_account_type ASC;

2026-02-17T10:26:47.008498+00:00Z.question: Provide weekly sales trend by area and nation

query_decomposition.intent_summary: Produce a weekly sales trend for the most recent 52 weeks with one row per week_end_date and sales by geography (areas and national total) presented as separate columns.

subqueries.name: max_date_cte
subqueries.purpose: Identify the most recent week_end_date in the dataset
subqueries.logic: Compute MAX(week_end_date) from drug_sales

subqueries.name: base_last52w
subqueries.purpose: Restrict data to the last 52 weeks relative to the dataset's most recent week_end_date and exclude non-positive sales
subqueries.logic: From drug_sales, filter to qty_sold_pu > 0 and week_end_date >= (MAX week_end_date from max_date_cte - 51 weeks)

subqueries.name: weekly_pivot_sales
subqueries.purpose: Compute weekly sales with geography in columns
subqueries.logic: From base_last52w, group by week_end_date and compute: sales_west = SUM(CASE WHEN area_nm = 'West' THEN qty_sold_pu ELSE 0 END); sales_east = SUM(CASE WHEN area_nm = 'East' THEN qty_sold_pu ELSE 0 END); sales_unknown = SUM(CASE WHEN area_nm = 'Unknown' THEN qty_sold_pu ELSE 0 END); sales_nation = SUM(qty_sold_pu). Coalesce nulls to 0 and round each metric to 0 decimals as integers.

validation_rules: Derive MAX(week_end_date) from data (do not use system date).
Define the 52-week window relative to MAX(week_end_date); include the max week and 51 prior weeks.
Use week_end_date for all weekly logic and filtering.
Exclude records where qty_sold_pu <= 0.
All metric outputs must be rounded to 0 decimals and returned as integers; coalesce nulls to 0.
sales_nation must equal the sum of sales_west + sales_east + sales_unknown for each week.
Area columns must be limited to the known values: 'West', 'East', and 'Unknown'.
No account-type merges are applied since account-type metrics are not requested.

2026-02-17T10:26:47.008498+00:00Z.final_sql:
WITH max_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM drug_sales
),
base_last52w AS (
  SELECT s.week_end_date, s.qty_sold_pu, s.area_nm
  FROM drug_sales s
  CROSS JOIN max_date_cte m
  WHERE s.qty_sold_pu > 0
    AND s.week_end_date >= DATE_SUB(m.max_week_end_date, INTERVAL 51 WEEK)
),
weekly_pivot_sales AS (
  SELECT
    week_end_date,
    CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN area_nm = 'West' THEN qty_sold_pu ELSE 0 END), 0), 0) AS UNSIGNED) AS sales_west,
    CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN area_nm = 'East' THEN qty_sold_pu ELSE 0 END), 0), 0) AS UNSIGNED) AS sales_east,
    CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN area_nm = 'Unknown' THEN qty_sold_pu ELSE 0 END), 0), 0) AS UNSIGNED) AS sales_unknown,
    CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(qty_sold_pu), 0), 0) AS UNSIGNED) AS sales_nation
  FROM base_last52w
  GROUP BY week_end_date
)
SELECT week_end_date, sales_west, sales_east, sales_unknown, sales_nation
FROM weekly_pivot_sales
ORDER BY week_end_date ASC;
